title: Connor's Resource Pack
description: Adds some old assets, the screaming goat meme and more.
body:
Connor's Resource Pack
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/153866804301b0bb026d412772700749745432d8.png) 

## Top features:

Custom Logo (3.0+)

"What a shame..." Death Screen (AU Only) (3.0+ Only)

Custom Lang Strings (AU Only)

Dirt Panorama Overlay

Old Minecraft Logo

Old Cobblestone

Old Ores

Alpha Foilage

Old Stripped Dark Oak

Old Gravel

Old Netherrack

Old Lava

Old Obsidian

Old Wool Colors

Old Sponge Texture

Old Lapis Texture

Old Ice

Old Water

Old Metal Blocks

1.11 Shulker Boxes

Poppy To Rose

Bed Icons

Terracotta to Hardened Clay

Dirt Path To Grass Path

Pottery Sherd To Shard

Old Alex and Steve

Old Door Sounds

Zombie Pigman

Old Enchant Glint

Blue Widgets Highlight

Old Damage Sounds

Old Explosion Sounds

Old XP Sounds

Screaming Goat Meme

3D Sun/Moon

Variated Villagers

Glass Doors

Ender Dragon Elytra

Golden Crown

Old Planks

Oarless Boats

Many parity features

Main colour orange

Cake Hunger Bars

3D stuff

ilmango Apples

Xisuma mobs

Wither Bee

Technoblade pigs (RIP)

Beeralis

Stridey Striders
